title: chrysanthemum nitens
intro: Chrysanthemum nitens, also known as the shiny chrysanthemum, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family, characterized by its yellow, white, or pink blooms and shiny leaves. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Chrysanthemum nitens is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating headaches, and soothing respiratory issues. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
